FAQ

Common questions about fire alarm systems and our services.

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should my fire alarm system be inspected?

NFPA requires annual inspections for most systems, with more frequent visual inspections recommended.

What is a fire alarm inspection?

A comprehensive test of all system components including detectors, pull stations, notification appliances, and control panels.

Do I need a permit for fire alarm work?

Most fire alarm installations and significant modifications require permits from your local authority having jurisdiction (AHJ).

What happens if my system fails inspection?

We'll work with you to address any issues and ensure your system passes re-inspection.

How long does installation take?

Timeline varies by project size and complexity. We provide detailed schedules during the quoting process.

Do you offer 24/7 emergency service?

Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency repair service for existing customers.

Have more questions?
